title: Lumi Lights Plus
description: Feature-packed shader pipeline for Canvas and can-pipe
body:
![a snowy mountain range in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2acc07ab71abce3fb922329ea3c3d0676d06336f_0.webp)

Lumi Lights is the original shader pipeline for [Canvas](https://modrinth.com/mod/canvas).

For current Minecraft version, [can-pipe](https://modrinth.com/mod/can-pipe) is recommended. Either mod is required to use this shader.

## Features

- Animated reflective water
- Bloom effect
- Customizable colors
- Directional sun lighting
- PBR/HDR shading
- Procedural sky
- Refraction and caustics effect
- Screenspace AO
- Screenspace reflections
- Temporal AA
- Volumetric clouds
- Volumetric fog

## "Plus"

This release includes Lumi PBR Ext, the procedurally generated PBR material.

![a showcase of shiny armors in various materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80f89bcd3973a6d95af79f8c316a5f9e8d42a5b_0.webp)

## How to use it

1. Install as a **resource pack**, enable it.
2. Configure the pipeline in **Video Settings**. For Canvas, it's located in the Canvas submenu.

## Etc.

```
Thanks to Grondag and the Canvas discord community server for the early support and hype on this project. You guys rock!

Lumi Lights uses various open source shader code. Full credit can be found in the original github readme:
https://github.com/spiralhalo/LumiLights#acknowledgement--special-thanks

Thanks for using Lumi Lights!
```
